spec.description: Given n steps and the ability to climb 1 or 2 steps at a time, return the number of distinct ways to reach the top.
Given coin denominations and a target amount, return the minimum number of coins needed to make the amount, or -1 if it is impossible.
Given a string, return the length of the longest substring without repeating characters.
Given integers 0 to n-1, arrange them in a sequence such that the absolute difference between every adjacent pair is divisible by at least one value in the list k.
